title: Context Parallelism
description: Training with million-token contexts by splitting the sequence across GPUs using Ring Attention and its optimized variants.
tags: The Long-Context Problem: Why We Need Context Parallelism

notebooks.title: Attention Memory Scaling
notebooks.objective: Measure attention memory at different sequence lengths, verify the O(S^2) scaling law, and implement chunked attention with online softmax.

notebooks.title: Ring Attention
notebooks.objective: Implement Ring Attention with virtual GPUs, trace KV rotation step by step, and analyze communication-computation overlap.

notebooks.title: Striped Attention for Causal LM
notebooks.objective: Implement striped (round-robin) token assignment, build Striped Ring Attention, and compare load balance against contiguous chunking.

curator.name: Dr. Rajat Dandekar
curator.title: Course Instructor
curator.bio: Dr. Rajat Dandekar is a researcher and educator specializing in AI/ML, with a passion for making complex concepts accessible through intuitive explanations and hands-on learning.
